arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski rescues draw for Tottenham to deny Rangers
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou does not seem prone to introspection and rarely succumbs to self doubt but maybe, just maybe, a little part of Tottenham’s manager wishes he had never left Glasgow. Things were so much simpler for the Australian when he was hoovering up trophies during his Celtic tenure. Back then Angeball not merely entertained but pretty much worked and he revelled in putting Rangers in their place. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Rangers 1-1 Tottenham: Postecoglou has a Tim Sherwood moment in scathing criticism of Timo Werner following draw at Ibrox
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou slams Timo Werner for his performance against Rangers, a day after he said he would never publicly criticise one of his own players.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou lays into Timo Werner for 'UNACCEPTABLE' display - after hauling off the Tottenham star at half-time of Europa League draw with Rangers
arts.sum: ''He wasn't playing anywhere near the level he should,' said Postecoglou. 'When you've got 18-year-olds out there, it's not acceptable'

arts.ttl: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou not happy with Timo Werner
arts.sum: Timo Werner’s performance in Glasgow ‘wasn’t acceptable’ according to Ange Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou returns to Scotland as Tottenham's Europa League woes mount
arts.sum: Tottenham's future in the Europa League remains uncertain as Ange Postecoglou's return to Scotland sees his side fail to beat Rangers.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou blasts 'unacceptable' Timo Werner performance in Rangers draw
arts.sum: Timo Werner was taken off at half-time during Tottenham's 1-1 draw with Rangers and Spurs boss Ange Postecoglou described the forward's display as "not acceptable"

arts.ttl: The Verdict: Spurs 'not good enough' in Rangers draw
arts.sum: Sky Sports' Michael Bridge and Gordon Duncan analyse Tottenham's draw with Rangers in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Ange slams Werner in Spurs draw: unacceptable
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou gave a scathing assessment of Timo Werner's performance in the team's 1-1 Europa League draw with Rangers on Thursday, saying the forward's performance "wasn't acceptable."
Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou says his side "weren't anywhere near" their best in their Europa League draw with Rangers.

arts.ttl: Clement: Rangers disappointed with Spurs draw - and I like that
arts.sum: Philippe Clement was buoyed by the hunger of his Rangers players after seeing their disappointment in drawing with Tottenham.
